_meta: Broader 10-prompt sample picked from finance_agent_benchmark spanning all question types not heavily covered by v1 sample. Curated to 10.

prompts.question: What was the total consideration cost TKO paid to acquired Endeavor assets measured at transaction close?
How many common stock shares are outstanding for ABNB? Format "Class X: X shares" add line break.
Calculate the 3 year revenue CAGR for Palantir Technologies.
What is the total amount of director compensation (in dollars) that was paid to the directors of 3D Systems in 2023?
How many basis points did MU beat or miss its Q3 2024 GAAP gross margin guidance?
What would be the impact to net income in dollars and percent if all debt for Boeing in 2024 were refinanced at 3% higher interest rates than current?
For the fiscal year ended 12/31/2023, what was Uber's (NYSE: UBER) largest adjustment to EBITDA. Provide the line item and amount in billions of dollars.

Assuming normal March seasonality over last three years, will TSM beat or miss Q2 guidance and by how much?
Show work.
What is the maximum dilutive impact in number of shares of Snapchat's outstanding convertible notes as of 12/31/2024?
How has US Steel addressed its planned merger with Nippton Steel and its effect on its business operations?
